creator: damian@tigger.cablenet.net
text:
The system crashes reliably when writing to an msdos partition on a
    jaz drive from a win95 client via an intermediary server (SMB) which
    has the jaz disk mounted via nfs

How-To-Repeat: 
    mount an msdos partition from a jaz disk (SCSI) on server A
    export the filesystem in /etc/exports on server A
    mount the filesystem via nfs on server B
    make this nfs volume available to the smb server on server B
    from a windows client copy files to the jaz disk on server A via server B
    server A crashes after about 1 minute
